---
title: "Mothers’ Union, The"
---

## Mothers’ Union, The

**Type:** organization

### About

This was founded by Mary Elizabeth Sumner in 1885.  CMY became the first editor of <i>Mothers in Council</i>, the journal aimed at the upper-class ladies who supported it.

### Letters Mentioning This Organization

- [To Frederick Orridge Macmillan, 1899](../letters/3391_To_Frederick_Orridge_Macmillan.html)
- [To Christabel Rose Coleridge, Oct 19 [1898]](../letters/3386_To_Christabel_Rose_Coleridge.html)

*... and 2 more*

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
